title: MUSIC VIDEO A — Sara at piano + Eva singing into mic, parents watching
prompt: @Sara sitting at a small upright piano center-left, hands GENTLY ON KEYS playing softly. @Eva standing center-right beside the piano holding a small handheld microphone. Mouths shape lyrics softly. @Mama and @Papa sitting on the couch in soft background watching with hands HELD. Happy tears on her cheeks. Soft smile from him. Twinkling fairy lights all around. Slow camera drift left-to-right for cinematic loop. NO LIP-SYNC required. Static formation, no character moves position. Only soft piano music — NO voices, NO speech. Suno song will be overlaid in post.
